nodes.name: Corypha
nodes.summary: Corypha（Corypha）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联11种鸟类，如Highland lark、Eastern clapper lark、Plains lark等11种鸟类。

nodes.name: Plateau lark
nodes.summary: Plateau lark（Corypha (bird) nigrescens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Plateau lark。

nodes.name: Plateau lark
nodes.summary: The plateau lark (Corypha nigrescens) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in east Zambia, north Malawi and south Tanzania. It was formerly treated as a subspecies of the rufous-naped lark. Taxonomy The plateau lark was formally described in 1900 by the German ornithologist Anton Reichenow based on a specimen collected in Tanzania north of Lake Malawi on the Kitulo Plateau. He considered it to be a subspecies of the rufous-naped lark and coined the trinomial name Mirafra africana nigrescens. The specific epithet is from Latin nigrescens, nigrescentis meaning "blackish". The plateau lark is now treated as a separate species and placed in the genus Corypha. This is based on the results of two molecular phylogenetic studies by a group of ornithologists led by Per Alström that were published in 2023 and 2024. Two subspecies are recognised: C. n. nigrescens (Reichenow, 1900) – northeast Zambia and south Tanzania C. n. nyikae (Benson, 1939) – east Zambia, north Malawi and southwest Tanzania References
